app.name: Agrandiz
language.label: Language
portal.title: From Photos Library to visible stories.
portal.subtitle: This local demo reads the Agrandiz SQLite cache generated from Apple Photos, then renders dashboards and story discovery galleries. No iCloud account connection, no upload, no deletion.
web.hero_subtitle: First scan your Photos Library. Then build dashboard and story outputs. Finally open the generated local portal.
web.permission_note: If Photos Library access fails, grant Full Disk Access: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access → Agrandiz
stories.hero_subtitle: Full-image thumbnails, fast exclude flow and hover/touch micro-sequences for more usable story candidates.
stories.curation_desc: When you click Exclude, the card is hidden immediately and the JSON below is updated. To make it persistent, paste the JSON into config/excludes.json and regenerate.
stories.clear_excludes: Clear temporary exclude list in this browser
family.subtitle: A timeline built from child, family, birthday, school, play and everyday-life memories in the Photos/iCloud archive.
family.note: This page was generated from the preview cache without downloading originals.
portal.card.stories.title: Curatable Moment Gallery
portal.card.stories.desc: Full-image thumbnails, exclude controls and hover micro-sequences for story candidates.
portal.card.family.title: Children's Growing-Up Story
portal.card.family.desc: A year-by-year timeline from child, family, birthday, school and everyday-life memories.
portal.card.dashboard.title: Archive Overview
portal.card.dashboard.desc: A local summary of the Apple Photos/iCloud archive, preview availability and strong candidates.
web.cache_card_desc: Build or refresh the local SQLite metadata cache from Apple Photos.
web.portal_card_desc: Generate story candidates, build the dashboard, create moment galleries, and prepare the family timeline.
template.people_timeline.desc: Builds a timeline dashboard from people, family, birthday, school and everyday-life signals.
